How it works
From zero to edge
in minutes.

No setup complexity. Log your first trade in under a minute.

01
📝
Log your trades
Add trades manually or import your full history from MetaTrader 5 in seconds. Set your asset type, risk, R-multiple and notes.
02
🔍
Discover your patterns
The analytics engine automatically surfaces your best sessions, instruments, setups and emotional states so you know exactly where your edge lives.
03
📈
Sharpen your edge
Use data to cut what's losing, double down on what works, and build a process you can repeat. Consistency is the edge.
Features
Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Built by traders, for traders. Every feature exists because it directly improves your decision-making.

📊
Performance Dashboard
Equity curve, win rate gauge, profit factor, expectancy and R-multiple — everything at a glance the moment you open the app.
🗓
Trading Heatmap
GitHub-style annual heatmap with monthly breakdown. Instantly see your best and worst trading periods across the year.
🧠
Daily Review
End-of-day process checklist with customizable questions. Track discipline, patience, and execution — not just P&L.
📐
MAE / MFE Analysis
Measure entry and exit efficiency. See how much of each move you captured and where you're leaving money on the table.
⚡
Multi-Asset Support
Full support for Forex (pips), Futures (ticks), Stocks and Crypto. Switch between asset views with one click.
💸
Prop Firm Withdrawals
Track payouts from FTMO, The5ers, Funded Next and more. Know exactly how much you've taken out vs what you've made.
🏷
Custom Fields
Create your own categories — setups, trade modes, entry quality. Analyze performance by any dimension that matters to you.
📥
MT5 Import
Import your entire trade history from MetaTrader 5 in seconds. No manual entry for historical data.
☁️
Cloud Sync
Your trades are saved to the cloud automatically. Access your journal from any device, anywhere, any time.

FAQ
Common questions.
MXOEDGE is a professional trading journal designed for prop traders and serious retail traders. It lets you log every trade, analyze your performance across multiple dimensions, and identify exactly what's working and what isn't in your trading.
You get full access for 7 days. Full access for 7 days, cancel anytime before the trial ends.
After 7 days, you can choose a plan to continue. If you're in the first 50 users, you lock in the beta price of $12/month or $120/year as long as you keep your subscription active — even when we raise prices later.
MXOEDGE supports Forex (tracked in pips), Futures (tracked in ticks), Stocks and CFDs (tracked in %), and Crypto. You can filter all analytics by asset type with one click.
Yes. Export your trade history as a CSV from MT5 and import it directly into MXOEDGE in seconds. All your historical data will be analyzed instantly.
Yes. Your data is stored securely in the cloud and is completely private. Only you can access your trades and analytics. We use Supabase with row-level security so each account is fully isolated.
Absolutely. Cancel anytime with no questions asked. Your data is always yours and you can export it at any time.
